mapper.sql: activity_id, title, description, start_time, end_time, location, type, organizer_id, status, create_time, update_time, image
mapper.select:
select
from activity order by create_time desc

select
from activity where status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by create_time desc

select
from activity where organizer_id = #{organizerId,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into activity (title, description, start_time, end_time, location, type, organizer_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{organizerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into activity
activity_id,
title,
description,
start_time,
end_time,
location,
type,
organizer_id,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
image,
#{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{organizerId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update activity
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organizer_id = #{organizerId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
image = #{image,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update activity set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, location = #{location,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organizer_id = #{organizerId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
